frontmatter.name: Local Voices First: Inclusive AI Starts on the Ground - Feb, 2026
frontmatter.summary: A session spotlighting why community-led data systems and local context are foundational to building truly inclusive AI.
frontmatter.context: In collaboration with [PARIS21](https://paris21.org/), CivicDataLab spotlighted why community-led data systems and local context are foundational to building truly inclusive AI. The session featured Shuchita Rawal, Open Contracting India Lead and Gaurav Godhwani, Executive Director and Co-Founder, CivicDataLab alongside Dr. Saurabh Garg (MoSPI - India) and Saachi Bhalla (Gates Foundation), sharing grounded perspectives on designing AI that starts with people, not platforms.

pageContext.nameRegex: /Local Voices First: Inclusive AI Starts on the Ground - Feb, 2026/
